description:
Add Memorial Hermann Southeast Hospital to the Resources section of CAMEO Data Manager using the following details:

- Hospital Name: Memorial Hermann Southeast Hospital
- Street Address: 11800 Astoria Blvd
- City: Houston
- State: TX
- Zip Code: 77089
- Phone: (713) 222-2323
- Contact Name: Emergency Department Director
- Notes: Level III Trauma Center. Primary receiving facility for chemical incidents from Clear Lake industrial area. Equipped with decontamination facilities.
